heading: Leased motor vehicles
label: 14102 Leased motor vehicles
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11107 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11107 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.text: make the arrangement in writing signed by the parties specifying its duration and the compensation to be paid by the motor carrier;
carry a copy of the arrangement in each motor vehicle to which it applies during the period the arrangement is in effect;
inspect the motor vehicles and obtain liability and cargo insurance on them; and

have control of and be responsible for operating those motor vehicles in compliance with requirements prescribed by the Secretary on safety of operations and equipment, and with other applicable law as if the motor vehicles were owned by the motor carrier.

children.heading: .—Responsible Party for Loading and Unloading
children.label: b .—Responsible Party for Loading and Unloading
children.text: The Secretary shall require, by regulation, that any arrangement, between a motor carrier of property providing transportation subject to jurisdiction under subchapter I of chapter 135 and any other person, under which such other person is to provide any portion of such transportation by a motor vehicle not owned by the carrier shall specify, in writing, who is responsible for loading and unloading the property onto and from the motor vehicle.
